_comment: Recipe book for Kitchen Agent back-calculation. Dual-schema: raw_direct dishes specify kg_per_unit directly (authored by someone who already knows raw weights per portion); batch dishes specify raw_inputs_kg + portions (authored by a chef who thinks 'I used X kg of flour to make Y pizzas'). Both are normalized to the same internal shape in kitchen.ts#loadRecipes. See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-12-pos-back-calculation-design.md for the full rationale and the deferred pass-3 work (yield_ratio audit, per-ingredient mass balance, substitution ledger, recipe versioning).

focaccia.notes: Full sheet pan, cut into 16 portions

tempura.notes: OIL is net oil consumed per batch (absorbed into food + disposed after quality threshold), not full fryer volume
